articles.author: Victoria Craw, Lauren Weber
articles.title: Air France flight to Detroit diverted to Canada under Ebola restrictions - The Washington Post
articles.description: A passenger from Congo should not have been aboard, authorities said. Under new DHS rules, people who recently visited any of three African countries must enter the U.S. via Dulles.
articles.content: An Air France flight from Paris to Detroit was diverted to Canada on Wednesday because a passenger on board was blocked from entering the United States under Ebola-related travel restrictions, author… [+10 chars]

articles.title: DRC Ebola hospital set on fire as protesters demand access to bodies of dead relatives - africanews.com
articles.description: Violence has erupted in eastern DR Congo after tensions linked to the handling of victims of the latest Ebola outbreak. Protesters in Rwampara wanted to recover the bodies of their dead relatives in order to bury them. When they were denied, they set the hosp…
articles.content:
Violence has erupted in eastern DR Congo's Ituri province after tensions linked to the handling of victims of the latest Ebola outbreak.
